description: INITIALIZE group item: numeric children to 0, alphanumeric children to SPACES.
notes: INITIALIZE WS-GROUP sets PIC X fields to SPACES and PIC 9 fields to 0. IBM gap: IBM pads SPACES to full PIC length (10 and 3 chars respectively). Engine sets string vars to single space ' ' via emit_initialize_single. WS-AMOUNT correctly becomes 0.00.
